checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds the governed specbridge-project-starter command, project starter artifact family, documentation, tests, inventory/readiness evidence, and the issue #237 starter artifact inside the active contract.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command validates required inputs, writes only to the declared project-starters path, emits JSON without mutation when OutputPath is omitted, records blocked scope, future spec package, agent architecture, validation plan, security prompts, and standard boundaries, and has CLI regression coverage.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: No protected files, dependencies, network calls, external repositories, billing, secrets, auth, database, CI/CD security, deployment, MCP mutation, cleanup enforcement, issue #194, or digital twin scope were changed.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The artifact explicitly blocks secrets, production, billing, auth, database destructive changes, dependency installation, deployment, MCP mutation, and cleanup enforcement until future contracts authorize them.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are declared in the issue-237 execution contract and scope manifest.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: validate-contracts, validate-contract-scopes, test-specbridge-cli, validate-final-reports, validate-audit-packets, validate-chatgpt-audits, specbridge-smoke, and git diff --check passed locally after the PS 5.1 array-binding fix.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub Actions passed on PR #238 head 1559dc29b9e5d07a4ac60a1cc326554458dc1c30: Foundation Validation, SpecBridge Review Gate, SpecBridge PR Review Report, and Claude Review Non Blocking.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report marks completion as complete, records GitHub CI passed, PR #238 merge, issue #237 closure, and no deployment.

findings.evidence: Claude Code delegation was attempted but did not complete due provider timeout/availability; Codex completed implementation locally under the same contract.
findings.recommendation: Keep Claude Code delegation bounded and retry only inside active contracts when provider availability is healthy.

findings.evidence: The project starter records future product scope and safety boundaries but intentionally does not build, deploy, connect accounts, or create external repositories.
findings.recommendation: Use future dedicated contracts for each real product implementation slice.

unresolved_risks: Claude Code provider execution was attempted but did not complete in this run; Codex completed local implementation under the same contract.
Future product builds still need dedicated contracts before implementation.
